summary: Iteration 64: Verified three new features - (1) Post-fusion possession scaling for pass-related props, (2) Basketball stat parser includes steals/blocks/turnovers, (3) INTEL tab completely redesigned with aggregate stats dashboard. All 43 pytest tests passed (15 new + 17 Bayesian + 11 Fusion). Frontend INTEL tab shows: overall performance stats (hit rate, hits, misses, avg error), Over vs Under direction split, hit rate by prop type with over/under breakdown, hit rate by position. Sport toggle (soccer/basketball) works correctly. Tracking tab shows record tracker and pick cards. COIN FLIP badge code exists but no picks have coinFlip=true currently. Health endpoint returns ok. No console errors.

success_rate.backend: 100% (43/43 pytest tests passed: 15 iteration 64 + 17 Bayesian + 11 Fusion)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (app loads without console errors, INTEL tab renders correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing settled picks for INTEL tab testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified three features: (1) Post-fusion possession scaling in predict.py lines 2048-2069 applies match dominance multiplier DIRECTLY to final projection for pass-related props (pass_attempts, passes, key_passes, crosses, dribbles) when multiplier differs >3% from 1.0. (2) Basketball stat parser in basketball_utils.py parse_player_stat() now includes steals, blocks, turnovers at lines 238-240. BBALL_STAT_MAP in picks.py also updated at lines 355-357. (3) INTEL tab in IntelTab.jsx completely rewritten from spreadsheet to aggregate dashboard - uses getIntelSheet API and computes aggregates client-side via useMemo. Shows overall performance, over/under split, prop type breakdown with over/under per prop, position breakdown. Sport toggle works. COIN FLIP badge exists in TrackingTab.jsx line 251-256 but requires picks with coinFlip=true field.

post_fusion_possession_scaling.metadata_field: possessionScaling with prePossession, postPossession, multiplier, expectedPossession

sections: Overall Performance (hit rate, hits, misses, avg error)
